mapper.update: UPDATE user_reviews SET overall_rating = #{overallRating}, food_rating = #{foodRating}, price_rating = #{priceRating}, ambiance_rating = #{ambianceRating}, service_rating = #{serviceRating}, text = #{text}, photos = #{photos}::text, helpful_votes = #{helpfulVotes}, unhelpful_votes = #{unhelpfulVotes}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_reviews SET helpful_votes = #{helpfulVotes}, unhelpful_votes = #{unhelpfulVotes}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_reviews WHERE (#{excludeUserId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} IS NULL OR user_id != #{excludeUserId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}) AND ( NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(text, '')), '') IS NOT NULL OR NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(photos, '')), '') IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY ( (overall_rating * 8) + (LEAST(helpful_votes, 20) * 2) + CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(text, '')), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(photos, '')), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 8 ELSE 0 END + GREATEST(0, 30 - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - created_at)) / 86400) + MOD(ABS(('x' || SUBSTR(MD5(id::text || TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYY-MM-DD-HH12')), 1, 8))::bit(32)::bigint), 10) ) DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_reviews WHERE place_id = #{placeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_reviews WHERE activity_booking_id = #{activityBookingId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId}
